description: Compute estimated arrival time and cumulative metrics for every route step (jobs, breaks, depots). Supports automatic ETA during solving and ETA-selection for provided route plans.

actors.name: Optimization Engine
actors.description: Computes ETAs during solving and chooses optimal ETAs in plan mode

actors.name: Dispatcher
actors.description: Reviews per-stop ETAs and communicates them to drivers or customers

rules.eta_formula: ETA at step n = ETA at step n-1 + service(n-1) + travel_time(n-1 to n) + waiting_time(n).
rules.waiting_time_formula: Waiting time at a step = max(0, time_window_start - arrival_time).
rules.setup_before_service: Setup time is applied before service time at each stop; both are included in the step record.
rules.plan_mode_minimises_violations: In plan mode, ETAs are chosen to minimise total timing violations while respecting the submitted stop ordering.
rules.load_after_step: A step's load field shows vehicle load AFTER the step is completed.
rules.timing_in_seconds: All timing values in solution output are in seconds; distances in metres.
rules.depot_no_service: For start and end depot steps, service and setup durations are zero.

values.description: ETAs computed automatically during VRP optimization
ETAs chosen for a user-submitted route (soft constraints)

transitions.description: Solver invoked in plan/ETA mode with pre-defined route steps

given: VRP solver has produced a feasible route
eta_computed_solving.result: Each route step includes arrival, cumulative duration, setup, service, and waiting_time fields.

given: user submitted ordered route steps with optional service_at/after/before hints
eta_chosen_plan_mode.result: Optimal ETA assigned to each step minimising violations; constraint breaches recorded.

given: vehicle arrives before a step's time window opens
step_waiting_time_recorded.result: Waiting time added to step record; departure from stop is window_start + setup + service.

given: distance reporting is enabled via geometry flag or distance matrix
distance_reported.result: Cumulative distance reported at each step; total distance in route and solution summary.

errors.message: Travel time data unavailable for a step pair; cannot compute ETA.

events.name: route.eta.computed
events.description: ETAs calculated for all steps in a vehicle route

events.name: step.waiting_time.recorded
events.description: Vehicle waited at a stop for a time window

events.name: route.distance.reported
events.description: Per-step and total distances appended to route

goals.description: Compute estimated arrival time and cumulative metrics for every route step (jobs, breaks, depots). Supports automatic ETA during solving and ETA-selection for provided route plans.

success_metrics.measurement: Successful operations divided by total attempts

human_checkpoints: before transitioning to a terminal state

tradeoffs.reason: workflow steps must complete correctly before proceeding
